core_beliefs.belief: 原子结构——电子在定态轨道运行
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔原子模型是 20 世纪物理学最重要的进展之一

core_beliefs.belief: 互补原理——波动与粒子互补
core_beliefs.source: items could be separately analysed in terms of contradictory properties(1927)
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔的互补原理是量子力学哥本哈根诠释的核心

core_beliefs.source: In his Nobel lecture, he outlined the correspondence principle
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔的对应原理:大量子数极限下量子→经典

core_beliefs.belief: 对爱因斯坦的质疑——完备 vs 隐变量
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔-爱因斯坦论战是 20 世纪物理哲学最著名的辩论

core_beliefs.belief: 不定义性——实在取决于实验安排
core_beliefs.source: the truth conditions of sentences ascribing a certain kinematic or dynamic value to an atomic object are dependent on the apparatus involved
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔主张原子对象的真值条件依赖于实验安排

core_beliefs.source: Heisenberg said Bohr was 'primarily a philosopher, not a physicist'
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔的物理学有深刻的哲学背景,受克尔凯郭尔影响

core_beliefs.belief: 互补为家徽——对立为互补
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔的互补原理浓缩为家徽格言,体现其哲学核心

core_beliefs.belief: 对爱因斯坦的开放态度——劝其流亡
core_beliefs.source: 玻尔 1933 建议爱因斯坦离开德国去美国
core_beliefs.explanation: 玻尔对反犹主义的关切,建议爱因斯坦流亡

key_themes: 对爱因斯坦的开放态度
